Introduction
language.p: This section presents documents that help you understand what AI is, how it works, and why SUSE AI is the right product for your locally hosed AI workloads.

language.title: Deployment
language.p: This section includes documents that help you deploy the SUSE AI product. To find more details about the products and components that SUSE AI depends on, refer to the section Additional Resources

language.title: Deployment
language.p: This section includes documents that describe how to install and upgrade the operating system components, such as hardware drivers or GPU related software.

language.title: Administration
language.p: This section describes how to administer the SUSE AI product. Here you can find, for example, procedures related to using the Open WebUI interface.

language.title: Configuration
language.p: This section describes how to configure the SUSE AI product. Here you can find, for example, tasks related to configuring the OpenWebUI interface.

language.title: Additional Resources
language.p: Here you can find references to the documentation of the products and components that SUSE AI requires.

desc.title: Locally hosted generative AI
desc.p: The SUSE AI service is a locally hosted generative AI. It provides secure auditable AI capabilities and allows organizations to deploy AI models on their own infrastructure.

language.title: コア製品のマニュアル

desc.title: Enterprise-class container management
desc.p: SUSE CaaS Platform is an enterprise-class container management solution that enables IT and DevOps professionals to more easily deploy, manage, and scale container-based applications and services. It includes Kubernetes to automate lifecycle management of modern applications, and surrounding technologies that enrich Kubernetes and make the platform itself easy to operate. As a result, enterprises that use SUSE CaaS Platform can reduce application delivery cycle times and improve business agility.

language.title: コア製品のマニュアル

desc.title: A modern application delivery platform
desc.p: SUSE Cloud Application Platform is a modern application delivery platform used to bring an advanced cloud native developer experience to Kubernetes—the de facto standard for enterprise container orchestration. SUSE Cloud Application platform eliminates manual IT configuration and helps accelerate innovation by getting applications to market faster. Developers can serve themselves and get apps to the cloud in minutes instead of weeks, while staying within IT guidelines, and without relying on scarce IT resources to perform manual configuration each step of the way. Streamlining application delivery opens a clear path to increased business agility, led by enterprise development, operations, and DevOps teams.

desc.title: Upgrade path between major versions of SUSE Linux Enterprise
desc.p: The Distribution Migration System provides an upgrade path for an installed SUSE Linux Enterprise system from one major version to another, for example, from SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP4 to SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15. For a Service Pack upgrade from one Service Pack (SP) to another within a given major version release series the existing Zypper migration workflow provides the supported upgrade path. The distribution migration system provides the ability to upgrade across major distributions without the need to use the next major version installation media to perform the system upgrade.

language.title: SUSE Linux Micro
language.p: SUSE Linux Micro is used as the base Operating System for the SUSE Edge platform stack. It provides a secure, stable, and minimal starting point to start building on.

language.title: SUSE Multi Linux Manager
language.p: SUSE Multi Linux Manager is a best-in-class open source infrastructure management solution for your software-defined infrastructure.

language.title: Container Management
language.p: Container management tools shipping with SUSE Edge.

language.title: Kubernetes
language.p: Kubernetes distributions shipping with SUSE Edge.

desc.title: Cloud native edge computing platform
desc.p: The SUSE Edge is a purpose-built cloud native edge computing platform for managing the full lifecycle of edge devices at scale. It is built by putting together open source components into a set of validated designs that we know work together to solve the different constraints we find when designing for and operating edge environments.

SUSE Edge ist eine speziell entwickelte Cloud-native Edge-Computing-Plattform für die Verwaltung des gesamten Lebenszyklus von Edge-Geräten in großem Maßstab. Es basiert auf der Zusammenstellung von Open-Source-Komponenten in einer Reihe validierter Designs, von denen wir wissen, dass sie zusammenarbeiten, um die verschiedenen Einschränkungen zu lösen, die wir beim Entwerfen und Betreiben von Edge-Umgebungen finden.

SUSE Edge es una plataforma de edge computing nativa en la nube para gestionar el ciclo de vida completo de los dispositivos periféricos a escala. Se basa en la unión de componentes de código abierto en un conjunto de diseños validados que sabemos que funcionan juntos para resolver las diferentes restricciones que encontramos al diseñar y operar entornos periféricos.

SUSE Edge est une plate-forme d'edge computing native cloud spécialement conçue pour gérer le cycle de vie complet des périphériques de périphérie à grande échelle. Elle est créée en réunissant des composants Open Source dans un ensemble de conceptions validées dont nous savons qu'elles fonctionnent ensemble pour résoudre les différentes contraintes rencontrées lors de la conception et de l'exploitation d'environnements de périphérie.
SUSE Edgeは、エッジデバイスのライフサイクル全体を大規模に管理するための専用のクラウドネイティブなエッジコンピューティングプラットフォームです。検証済みの設計セットにオープンソースコンポーネントを組み込んで構築されており、エッジ環境の設計と運用時に直面するさまざまな制約を解決するために連携して機能することが確認されています。

O SUSE Edge é uma plataforma de computação distribuída, nativa da nuvem e especialmente desenvolvida para gerenciar o ciclo de vida completo de dispositivos avançados em escala. Ele foi criado com a combinação de componentes de código-fonte aberto e um conjunto de designs validados que são reconhecidos por seu trabalho unido para resolver as diferentes restrições encontradas ao projetar e operar ambientes avançados.
SUSE Edge 是专门构建的云原生边缘计算平台，用于大规模管理边缘设备的整个生命周期。它通过将不同开源组件整合为一组经过验证可协同工作的设计构建而成，用于解决我们在针对边缘环境进行设计和操作时发现的不同限制。

Technical Reference Documentation provides guidance for implementing solutions with SUSE products, often in combination with the products of hardware and software partners (IHVs and ISVs). These documents offer blueprints for specific scenarios and use cases and are created by SUSE specialists in close collaboration with technology partner experts.​

Documents published as part of the SUSE Technical Reference Documentation series have been contributed voluntarily by SUSE employees and third parties. They are meant to serve as examples of how particular actions can be performed. They have been compiled with utmost attention to detail. However, this does not guarantee complete accuracy.
SUSE cannot verify that actions described in these documents do what is claimed or whether actions described have unintended consequences. SUSE LLC, its affiliates, the authors, and the translators may not be held liable for possible errors or the consequences thereof.
